calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf and Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

Counsel addressed the issue of why the Court should entertain distribution by way of a petition when the Probate Code allows the Public Administrator to just file a statement and receipts. Mr. Weinkauff stated that the $7,600.00 reserve was an amount that was recommended by the Accountant. The petition for final distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
